character.name: Gale
character.prompt: Weather wizard penguin avatar. Small chibi penguin mage with round penguin body, cream face and belly, deep teal-blue feathers, navy wizard hat with gold band, short cloak, tiny orange beak and feet, and flippers used as casting arms. Match Apex's polished cozy RPG sprite style: painterly pixel-sprite finish, crisp dark outline, soft cel-painted highlights, compact monster-battler proportions, transparent background.
